skillsSnapshot.prompt:
The following skills provide specialized instructions for specific tasks.
Use the read tool to load a skill's file when the task matches its description.
When a skill file references a relative path, resolve it against the skill directory (parent of SKILL.md / dirname of the path) and use that absolute path in tool commands.

<available_skills>
  <skill>
    <name>coding-agent</name>
    <description>Delegate coding tasks to Codex, Claude Code, or Pi agents via background process. Use when: (1) building/creating new features or apps, (2) reviewing PRs (spawn in temp dir), (3) refactoring large codebases, (4) iterative coding that needs file exploration. NOT for: simple one-liner fixes (just edit), reading code (use read tool), thread-bound ACP harness requests in chat (for example spawn/run Codex or Claude Code in a Discord thread; use sessions_spawn with runtime:"acp"), or any work in ~/clawd workspace (never spawn agents here). Claude Code: use --print --permission-mode bypassPermissions (no PTY). Codex/Pi/OpenCode: pty:true required.</description>
    <location>~/.openclaw/skills/coding-agent/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>healthcheck</name>
    <description>Host security hardening and risk-tolerance configuration for OpenClaw deployments. Use when a user asks for security audits, firewall/SSH/update hardening, risk posture, exposure review, OpenClaw cron scheduling for periodic checks, or version status checks on a machine running OpenClaw (laptop, workstation, Pi, VPS).</description>
    <location>~/.openclaw/skills/healthcheck/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>node-connect</name>
    <description>Diagnose OpenClaw node connection and pairing failures for Android, iOS, and macOS companion apps. Use when QR/setup code/manual connect fails, local Wi-Fi works but VPS/tailnet does not, or errors mention pairing required, unauthorized, bootstrap token invalid or expired, gateway.bind, gateway.remote.url, Tailscale, or plugins.entries.device-pair.config.publicUrl.</description>
    <location>~/Cursor/openclaw/skills/node-connect/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>savechat</name>
    <description>Archive current session to sessions.json so it appears in the session list. Use when the user says "savechat", "save chat", "保存对话", "归档对话", or wants to save/archive the current conversation before starting a new one.</description>
    <location>~/.openclaw/skills/savechat/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>skill-creator</name>
    <description>Create or update AgentSkills. Use when designing, structuring, or packaging skills with scripts, references, and assets.</description>
    <location>~/.openclaw/skills/skill-creator/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>weather</name>
    <description>Get current weather and forecasts via wttr.in or Open-Meteo. Use when: user asks about weather, temperature, or forecasts for any location. NOT for: historical weather data, severe weather alerts, or detailed meteorological analysis. No API key needed.</description>
    <location>~/.openclaw/skills/weather/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>screenshot</name>
    <description>MacOS screenshot capture tool. Use when: user asks to take screenshots, capture screen regions, or save screenshots to files.</description>
    <location>~/.openclaw/skills/screenshot/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>session-sync</name>
    <description>Sync OpenClaw sessions to a GitHub repository for seamless continuation across different machines. Use when the user says "save-session", "save-all-session", "session-list", "session-update", "sync session", "备份会话", "同步会话", or wants to push/pull session data to/from GitHub. NOT for: general git operations, file syncing, or other backup tasks.</description>
    <location>~/.openclaw/skills/session-sync/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>wechat-helper</name>
    <description>WeChat management and automation helper. Use when: user asks to open WeChat, check WeChat status, or automate WeChat workflows via AppleScript.</description>
    <location>~/.openclaw/skills/wechat-helper/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
</available_skills>

compactionCheckpoints.summary:
## Goal
Collect and organize cutting-edge AI technology information for the user (吕峥), acting as an AI frontier exploration assistant named "Scout".

## Constraints & Preferences
- Collection scope: Foreign tech giants (Anthropic, OpenAI, Cursor, Google), foreign tech bloggers, GitHub open-source projects, AI news (domestic & international), Chinese tech giants (Alibaba, Meituan, ByteDance)
- Focus areas: AI engineering practice — Harness, AI Agent frameworks, RAG, context engineering, memory engineering
- Output style: Collection-oriented with summaries and trend analysis; not too deep (dedicated Agent handles in-depth articles)
- Materials should be categorized with source links; prefer content within 3 months
- Work mode: On-demand collection only, no automatic periodic tasks
- Web search API (Brave) is NOT configured — must use `web_fetch` directly from source sites
- User timezone: Asia/Shanghai (GMT+8)

## Progress
### Done
- [x] Bootstrap: Created identity as "Scout 🔭", AI frontier exploration assistant
- [x] Set up IDENTITY.md, USER.md, MEMORY.md, and daily memory files
- [x] Deleted BOOTSTRAP.md after setup
- [x] Stored collection scope and preferences in MEMORY.md
- [x] First collection run (4/15): Gathered and organized 2-week AI frontier info across Anthropic, OpenAI, Cursor, Google, GitHub trending projects, and Hacker News

### In Progress
- [ ] (none currently active — user dismissed after receiving the report)

### Blocked
- **Brave Search API not configured**: `web_search` fails with `missing_brave_api_key`; all research relies on `web_fetch` from known URLs
- **OpenAI blog** is JS-rendered — only title lists retrievable, full article content inaccessible via `web_fetch`
- **Google Blog** rendering issues — limited content extraction
- **Chinese tech giants (阿里/美团/字节)** not covered in this collection round
- **Edit tool** had repeated errors ("Use either edits or single replacement mode") — resorted to full `write` overwrites

## Key Decisions
- **Full file rewrites instead of edits**: The `edit` tool consistently failed, so all memory/file updates use `write` to overwrite entire files
- **Direct URL fetching strategy**: Since web_search is unavailable, fetched directly from claude.com/blog, openai.com/news, github.com/trending, cursor.com/blog, research.google/blog, news.ycombinator.com
- **Report structure**: Categorized into 4 sections — Foreign giants, GitHub trending, HN highlights, Trend observations

## Next Steps
1. Configure Brave Search API (`openclaw configure --section web`) to enable broader search coverage
2. When user requests next collection, supplement with Chinese tech giants (阿里/美团/字节) and deeper Google/OpenAI content
3. Continue on-demand collection per user's instructions

## Critical Context
- Workspace root: `/Users/lvzheng/.openclaw/workspace-assistant-aiexplore/`
- Key files: `IDENTITY.md`, `USER.md`, `MEMORY.md`, `memory/2026-04-06.md`, `memory/2026-04-15.md`
- User: 吕峥 (he/him), Asia/Shanghai timezone
- The detailed 4/15 collection report was delivered covering: Anthropic (Managed Agents, multi-agent coordination, harness design, Claude Code redesign), OpenAI (TBPN acquisition, $122B funding, Codex pricing), Cursor (Cursor 3, third era of AI dev), GitHub projects (hermes-agent 85k⭐, multica 12.7k⭐, Archon 18k⭐, claude-mem 56k⭐, DeepTutor, PersonaPlex, ai-hedge-fund), and 5 trend observations

---

**Turn Context (split turn):**

## 原始请求
用户要求提供关于中国主要科技公司（"国内大厂"）的补充信息，特别是阿里巴巴、美团和字节跳动，可能作为正在进行的某个更广泛的技术格局追踪任务的一部分。

## 早期进展
- 尝试抓取阿里巴巴的 ATA (atatech.org)、美团技术博客、字节跳动/微信渠道和知乎技术内容。
- 许多来源失败：ATA 需要内部登录，微信公众号被阻止，知乎返回 DNS 错误，InfoQ 和 36Kr 等国内媒体网站需要 JS 渲染。
- 成功从美团技术博客获取了最近的头条新闻（2026年3月）：`BI` 平台/指标平台探索、大众点评 `M` 站 `Qwik.js` 重构、`LongCat-Flash-Lite` `MoE` 模型（685 亿参数）。
- 从 GitHub `org` 页面获取了字节跳动的主要开源项目：一个多模态 `AI Agent` 栈（29.4k 星）、`Trae Agent`（61.6k 星）、`FlowGram` 工作流框架。
- 从 QwenLM GitHub 获取了阿里巴巴的主要项目：`Qwen3.5`、`Qwen3-VL`、`Qwen3-Coder`、`Qwen3-omni`、`Qwen-Agent`。
- 详细抓取了 `Qwen-Agent`（基于 `Qwen` 的函数调用、`MCP`、代码解释器、`RAG`、`Chrome` 扩展）和 `Qwen3.5`。
- 成功抓取了 `Trae-Agent`（字节跳动的 `LLM` 驱动的 `SWE` 代理）。
- 获取了火山引擎（火山方舟）文档，显示豆包模型、`Seedance` 视频生成、`Seedream` 图像模型、精调能力、`MCP` 支持。
- 尝试了多个特定项目 URL，但返回了 404（`AgentTrek`、`FlowGram`、`seed-mcp`、美团特定文章）。

## 后续上下文
- 助手已成功收集到阿里巴巴（`Qwen3.5` 系列、`Qwen-Agent`）、字节跳动（`Trae Agent`、豆包/火山引擎生态系统）和美团（`LongCat-Flash-Lite`、`BI` 平台、`Qwik.js` 重构）的可用数据。
- 大多数国内媒体/博客网站无法通过简单的网页抓取访问（需要 `JS` 渲染或登录）。
- 助手可能即将根据收集到的数据综合最终回复。
